memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
The Visitation of Wiltshire states that Thomas was the eldest son and heir of Richard and Margaret Stephens of Burderopp.[1]

It also notes that he married Joan, the daughter of John Prater …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Stephens於1510年出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親Arther Richard Stephens11507歲，母親Joane Atheward25歲。他於1536年1月15日與Joane Prater在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯文頓結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1562年8月30日在英國維爾爾英格萊善姆享年52歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Stephens于1510年出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲Arther Richard Stephens11507岁，母亲Joane Atheward25岁。他于1536年1月15日与Joane Prater在英国英格兰維爾爾斯文頓结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1562年8月30日在英国維爾爾英格萊善姆享年52岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Stephens was born in 1510, in Wiltshire, England, his father, Arther Richard Stephens, was 11507 and his mother, Joane Atheward, was 25. He married Joane Prater on 15 January 1536, in Swindon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 30 August 1562, in Inglesham, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Stephens est né en 1510, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Arther Richard Stephens, avait 11507 ans et sa mère, Joane Atheward, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joane Prater le 15 janvier 1536, à Swindon, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 août 1562, à Inglesham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Stephens 1510 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arther Richard Stephens 11507 und seine Mutter Joane Atheward 25. Er hat am 15. Januar 1536 in Swindon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Joane Prater geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. August 1562 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Inglesham, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stephens è nato il nel 1510 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Arther Richard Stephens, aveva 11507 anni e il suo madre, Joane Atheward, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joane Prater il 15 gennaio 1536, nel Swindon, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 agosto 1562, nel Inglesham, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stephensが1510年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Arther Richard Stephensは11507歳，母Joane Athewardは25歳であった。1536年1月15日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスウィンドンでJoane Praterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1562年8月30日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアイングレシャムで52歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Stephens(이)가 1510년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arther Richard Stephens(은)는 11507세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Atheward(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1536년 1월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스윈던에서 Joane Prater(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1562년 8월 30일 영국 윌츠히르 잉글레샤에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stephens nasceu em 1510, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Arther Richard Stephens, tinha 11507 anos e sua mãe, Joane Atheward, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Prater em 15 de janeiro de 1536, em Swindon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1562, em Inglesham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ro.West Pennard, Somerset, England, United: West Pennard, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Stephens родился в 1510 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Arther Richard Stephens было 11507 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Atheward, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Prater 15 января 1536 г. в местности свиндон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 августа 1562 г. в местности инглешам, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Stephens nació en 1510, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Arther Richard Stephens, tenía 11507 años y su mamá, Joane Atheward, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joane Prater el 15 de enero de 1536, en Swindon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1562, en Inglesham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
